name: DigiDates
description: Calculate a person's age, count down to a target date, and compute calendar week numbers from date strings.

auth.hint: DigiDates is a free, unauthenticated API; no credential is required.

tools.name: get_age
tools.description: Calculate the age in years, and in a years/months/days breakdown, for a given birth date.

tools.name: get_countdown
tools.description: Calculate the countdown in days, and in a years/months/days breakdown, to a target date.

params.name: date
params.description: Target date to count down to, such as 2024-12-31.

tools.name: get_week_number
tools.description: Get the ISO calendar week number for a given date.

params.name: date
params.description: Date to get the week number of, such as 1970-01-01.

tools.name: check_leap_year
tools.description: Determine whether a given year is a leap year.
